title: Vacancy for Teacher at Manipal University

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Manipal University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Manipal University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Manipal University:
Manipal University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University!
